title: Sampling and ranking spatial transcriptomics data embeddings to identify tissue architecture.
author: Lin Y Wang Y Liang Y Yu Y Li J Ma Q He F Xu D
content: S-EPMC9411666 PMC9411666 Sampling and ranking spatial transcriptomics data embeddings to identify tissue architecture.
